levels.motivazione: Structural equilibrium across all three expirations. Monthly Max Pain alignment creates powerful magnetic attraction. Major dealer hedging inflection zone 10% below spot.
Weekly peak volume (599) with multi-expiry participation. Primary support cluster 3% below spot. High concentration of ITM calls creates dealer support.
Monthly peak volume (682) creates strong magnetic attraction. Second highest concentration across all datasets. Dealer delta hedging zone.

Highest visible strike, closest to spot (2.8% below). First friction point on pullbacks. Weekly volume (277) notable.

Extreme PCR (14.50) in monthly indicates excessive bearish positioning - contrarian bullish signal. Max pain at 26900 provides upward price magnet. levels.motivazione: Monthly gamma flip marking structural dealer transition zone. Spot trading 6% above indicates positive gamma territory, but negative total GEX creates volatility amplification risk on any pullback.
Dominant PUT open interest (OI: 10) in monthly expiration creating resistance zone above spot. Dealers short puts must hedge by selling on rallies toward this level.
Monthly max pain level where option premiums minimize. Market maker target zone acting as price magnet, approximately 6.7% above current spot.
Highest 0DTE volume cluster (VOL: 197) representing intraday friction. Deep ITM calls create hedging flow dynamics below spot.
